name: audit-dependencies
tagline: Fixes pnpm audit vulnerabilities via direct bump, lockfile update, or scoped override, then opens a PR.
verdict: Concrete, deterministic dependency-audit workflow with clear fix ordering, override rules, and a defined PR template; misses tool-availability declarations (pnpm, gh) and any versioning/changelog signal, and states no out-of-scope cases.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance anywhere in description or body.
pnpm and gh invoked throughout with no requirements/availability check section.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere.
